templates.body:
Hi [name],

Project [job_id] is live.

Deposit: received
Proof due from you: [proof_date]
Ship target: [ship_date]
Your POC: [client_poc]

Reply with assets or questions. Changes after today need change order.

Hi [name],

Quote [ref] accepted. Production starts when deposit $[amount] clears.
Pay: [link]

Calendar slot held 48h pending payment.

RUSH KICKOFF [job_id]
Deposit + rush fee: received
Proof back by: [datetime] hard
Ship: [date]

Missed proof window may move ship.

PROOF PATH
Round 1 mockup: [date]
Your feedback by: [date]
Round 2 if needed: [date]
Final approval before production: required in writing

INSTALL KICKOFF
Site: [address]
Date: [date] window [time]
Access: [notes]
Site POC: [name] [phone]

Confirm access 24h prior.

Before we start: confirming scope matches quote [ref]:
[list]

Reply CONFIRM or list changes (may affect price/timeline).

Repeat of [prior_job]. Same specs unless you note changes by [date].
Ship target: [date].

JOB CARD
ID: [job_id]
Owner: [name]
Ship: [date]
Deposit: [y/n]
Proof: [status]
Notes: ___
